COURT OF APPEAL Remittitur Received - The matter is remanded to the trial court with instructions to modify the sentence on count IX to run concurrently rather than consecutively, to impose a total aggregate sentence of 11 years, four months, and to determine Trammel's actual total custody credits as of November 23, 2022.  The court shall order the clerk of the superior court to prepare a second amended abstract of judgment memorializing these changes and transmit a copy to the Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation.   In all other respects, the judgment is affirmed.
